data.title: SEREED Toddler Balance Bike 2 Year Old, No Pedal Kids Toy Bike for 2-5 Years Old, Tool-Free Adjustment, Gift for 2-3 Boys Gir

features: STURDY AND SAFE- What you think for your kids is what SEREED toddler balance bike have. Wide and tough carbon steel frame
supports up to 110 lbs
safe footrest pad
rubber grips
soft saddle and a 12.6 inch starting seat height
let your little one enjoy cycling at an early age!
GROW WITH KIDS- Equipped with quick-release mechanism
parents can adjust the seat height(12.6-17.1inch) and handlebars height(19.6-22.5inch) without tools
easily adjust to the most suitable height for your child.
WHY YOU NEED IT?- With the no pedals bicycle
child will learn balance and steering
boost self-confidence
which makes transitioning to a pedal bike much smoother. In addition
bonus plate and stickers let kids personalize their own balance bike!
READY FOR RIDING FUN- Weighing 3.5kg (7.8 pounds)
easy for boys and girls to push and pull independently. Parents will also appreciate its portability
just packing it into the car trunk and go for adventures with the little ones!
SMOOTH RIDING- EVA foam airless tires that are noiseless
anti-slip and never go flat
ideal for all terrains. Children can freely explore outdoors or gliding indoors without scratching the floors.

relatedProducts.Title: KRIDDO Toddler Balance Bike 2 Year Old, Age 24 Months to 5 Years Old, 12 Inch Push Bicycle with Customize Plate (3 Sets of Stickers Included), Gift Bike for 2-3 Boys Girls, White
relatedProducts.Features: EARLY LEARNING BALANCE BIKE – A fun way to introduce small toddlers to riding bicycles this girls and boys balance bike lets them push, stand, and walk their way around the outdoors with a sturdy frame and well-balanced, kid-friendly design for 2 to 5 years old. | CUSTOMIZE PLATE – Each balancing bike comes with a removable customizable plate, where kids can design their own plate with the stickers or draw anything they want. | ENHANCED SAFETY – Along with a soft, rubber grip handlebars, a soft PU seat, this kids balance bike has built in a wide tough carbon-steel frame, it can holds up to 110 lbs and you never need to worry that it will break when kids are learning to ride around. | EXTRA-THICK NEVER-FLAT TIRES – We want kids to feel strong and stable when they’re moving on grass and sidewalks which is why we added puncture-resistant tires to the front and back of each balance bike for 5-year old’s and 24-month-old riders. | GROW WITH YOUR KIDS – We know kids grow fast and we would like them to enjoy their riding partner longer, both handlebar and seat height can be adjusted, the quick release mechanizm makes it really easy and safe to adjust the handlebar and seat height to your needs.

structure: KRIDDO Toddler Balance Bike 2 Year Old
12 Inch Push Bicycle with Customize Plate (3 Sets of Stickers Included)
features: EARLY LEARNING BALANCE BIKE – A fun way to introduce small toddlers to riding bicycles this girls and boys balance bike lets them push
stand
and walk their way around the outdoors with a sturdy frame and well-balanced
kid-friendly design for 2 to 5 years old.
CUSTOMIZE PLATE – Each balancing bike comes with a removable customizable plate
where kids can design their own plate with the stickers or draw anything they want.
ENHANCED SAFETY – Along with a soft
rubber grip handlebars
a soft PU seat
this kids balance bike has built in a wide tough carbon-steel frame
it can holds up to 110 lbs and you never need to worry that it will break when kids are learning to ride around.

EXTRA-THICK NEVER-FLAT TIRES – We want kids to feel strong and stable when they’re moving on grass and sidewalks which is why we added puncture-resistant tires to the front and back of each balance bike for 5-year old’s and 24-month-old riders.
GROW WITH YOUR KIDS – We know kids grow fast and we would like them to enjoy their riding partner longer
both handlebar and seat height can be adjusted
the quick release mechanizm makes it really easy and safe to adjust the handlebar and seat height to your needs.
